task_completion.description: Create the Post-Mortem Dashboard tiddler with the correct title and tag
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tiddler titled 'Post-Mortem Dashboard' is visible and has the tag 'Dashboard'.

task_completion.description: The dashboard dynamically lists all PostMortem tiddlers
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Post-Mortem Dashboard' tiddler displays a list of existing post-mortem entries. In edit mode, this should be achieved using a dynamic filter (e.g., `<<list-links "[tag[PostMortem]]">`).

task_completion.description: The dashboard contains the 'Create New Post-Mortem' button
task_completion.visual_evidence: A clickable button labeled 'Create New Post-Mortem' is visible in the rendered view of the 'Post-Mortem Dashboard' tiddler.

task_completion.description: The button generates a new draft tiddler with the correct title and tags
task_completion.visual_evidence: When the button is clicked (or in the button's action code), a new tiddler is created with the title 'New Post-Mortem Report' and the tags 'PostMortem' and 'Draft'.

task_completion.description: The generated draft tiddler includes the required custom fields
task_completion.visual_evidence: The new draft tiddler contains a custom field 'incident_date' with the value 'YYYY-MM-DD' and a custom field 'severity' with the value 'SEV-'.

task_completion.description: The generated draft tiddler includes the required body content and headings
task_completion.visual_evidence: The new draft tiddler's text body contains the exact headings '!! Summary', '!! Root Cause', and '!! Resolution', along with their respective placeholder texts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the TiddlyWiki web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent using a web browser to navigate and edit TiddlyWiki, rather than modifying backend files via terminal.

integrity.description: The agent used TiddlyWiki widget syntax to create a functional button
integrity.visual_evidence: In the edit view of the dashboard, the agent wrote actual TiddlyWiki widget code (e.g., `<$button>`, `<$action-sendmessage>`) rather than just typing the plain text 'Create New Post-Mortem'.

integrity.description: The agent used a dynamic filter for the list instead of hardcoding
integrity.visual_evidence: In the edit view of the dashboard, the agent used TiddlyWiki filter syntax (like `[tag[PostMortem]]`) rather than manually typing out the titles of the 5 existing post-mortem tiddlers.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Dashboard Title: 'Post-Mortem Dashboard'. Expected Tag: 'Dashboard'. The dashboard must list tiddlers tagged 'PostMortem'. The dashboard must contain a button labeled 'Create New Post-Mortem'. When clicked, this button must generate a tiddler with Title: 'New Post-Mortem Report', Tags: 'PostMortem' and 'Draft', Fields: 'incident_date' (value 'YYYY-MM-DD') and 'severity' (value 'SEV-'), and Body containing headings '!! Summary', '!! Root Cause', and '!! Resolution'.
